The Light
Changes
Everything

Our AW26 collection is a study in transition — fabrics chosen for how they hold the last warmth of autumn. Each piece is made to outlast the season it was built for.

Essay — Materials
Why We Only Use Traceable Merino

Every gram of wool in the Solar Fleece comes from a single certified farm in the South Island. We visited. We took notes. Here's what we found.

Behind The Collection
Notes on Designing for the In-Between Season

Creative Director Mara Sol on the six-month process of building a wardrobe around a single temperature: 12°C at dusk.

Stockists
New Doors: Tokyo, Copenhagen & Nairobi

Three cities, three spaces, one consistent obsession with the way daylight feels when autumn begins. Our newest stockists open this week.
